calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment Per Stipulation And Recall Writ Of Possession
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KRISTEN GOODWIN'S Motion to Vacate Judgment Per Stipulation and Recall Writ Of Possession. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alana Gricu-Cooner for Plaintiff Johnson Chiao, who is present.
Samantha Zenweack, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Kristen Goodwin, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 1991 California St. #201, San Francisco, CA 94109. See scanned document. Trial date of 12/29/08 is vacated.

JPT Will Chen, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
